channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Kansas tops AP Top 25 preseason men's basketball poll ahead of Alabama, defending champion UConn
item.description: Kansas was picked first in the AP Top 25 preseason men’s basketball poll Monday, getting the No. 1 nod on half of the 60 ballots from a national media panel to start the season ahead of Alabama and two-time defending national champion UConn. Kansas scooped up 30 first-place votes from the AP panel.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lions' Aidan Hutchinson has surgery on fractured tibia, fibula with no timeline for return
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Detroit Lions defensive end Aidan Hutchinson had successful surgery to repair a fractured tibia and fibula that he sustained against the Dallas Cowboys, the team announced Monday while saying there's no timeline for his return to play.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Spike Lee's 1st trip, Michael Jordan's welcome to newcomers and more from basketball Hall of Fame
item.description: SPRINGFIELD, Mass. (AP) — Spike Lee got a photo with Larry Bird and a technical foul from a Hall of Fame referee. Not a bad first trip to basketball's birthplace to pick up an honor he didn't know existed. The film maker was added to the Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall of Fame's superfans gallery.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Giants' loss to Bengals extends their winless streak at MetLife Stadium
item.description: EAST RUTHERFOPD, N.J. (AP) — The New York Giants are giving new meaning to the phrase: “There is no place like home.” Home is becoming the last place the Giants (2-4) want to be these days.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Mets' Kodai Senga struggles with control, knocked out in 2nd inning by Dodgers in NLCS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Kodai Senga knew something was off just before he took the mound in the National League Championship Series opener.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Joe Burrow runs for a TD and the Bengals' defense carries them past the Giants, 17-7
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — Joe Burrow made just enough plays and the maligned Bengals defense stepped up and delivered a much-needed victory that gave Cincinnati some hope after a dismal start.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers use timely hitting to support Jack Flaherty's gem in NLCS opener vs Mets
item.description: Jack Flaherty gave the Los Angeles Dodgers seven strong innings and helepd pick up the Game 1 win over the New York Mets to start the NLCS.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jim Harbaugh misses part of Chargers' win over Broncos for treatment of irregular heartbeat
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Jim Harbaugh listened to his heart when he began to feel a little bit off in pregame warmups. The Los Angeles Chargers coach went into the medical tent and then to the locker room in the first quarter Sunday to get checked out for an irregular heartbeat.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Matt McCarty goes from Korn Ferry to the Masters after winning in Utah for first PGA Tour title
item.description: IVINS, Utah (AP) — Matt McCarty started the year on the Korn Ferry Tour and now is headed to the Masters, winning his first PGA Tour title Sunday at the Black Desert Championship with a 4-under 67 and one swing that all but sealed it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cardinals' Marvin Harrison Jr wobbles, falls to ground after hit in scary scene
item.description: Arizona Cardinals wide receiver Marvin Harrison Jr. left Sunday's game against the Green Bay Packers with a concussion after a scary scene.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Titans' Will Levis barrels over crew member on scramble, leaves worker injured
item.description: Tennessee Titans quarterback Will Levis accidentally took out a crew member on the sideline during his game against the Indianapolis Colts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blackhawks beat Oilers, 5-2, for first win of 2024-25 season
item.description: EDMONTON, Alberta (AP) — The Blackhawks will go into the final game of their season-opening road trip with win on their ledger.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Vasily Espindola and the Redland Chargers take on the Fruita Cowboys
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—In a dramatic 10U football playoff game, the Redland Chargers overcame a 13-point deficit in the second quarter, despite losing their starting quarterback to injury.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: BYU improves to 6-0 after trouncing Arizona, 41-19
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU football team continues to prove all the preseason prognosticators wrong. The #14 Cougars battered Arizona Saturday at LaVell Edwards Stadium to improve to 6-0 for the first time since 2020 with a dominating 41-19 victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: How to cheer on the Padres for NLDS Game 5
item.description: Fans are still cheering on the San Diego Padres as they take on the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 of the National League Division Series Friday evening, following Wednesday's 8-0 blowout.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Be careful when buying Dodgers-Padres NLDS Game 5 tickets online, USAA says
item.description: Friday night will bring the biggest baseball game in Los Angeles in years as the San Diego Padres visit the Dodgers for a winner-take-all Game 5 in the National League Division Series. And the high stakes are bringing high ticket prices.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, Fox 5

item.title: Fruita Softball wins 13th straight to take home Southwestern League title
item.description: Attention Colorado high school softball teams: you do not want to see the Fruita Monument Wildcats right now.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Penn State makes its first west coast Big Ten trip to USC
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK (Nittany Nation) -- It's not your granddaddy's Big Ten anymore and this week's conference lineup is the people's exhibit A. Minnesota heads to UCLA, Ohio State is at Oregon, and Penn State heads to USC. Three games that hardly feel like Big Ten conference play.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Clay, NewsNation

item.title: California lawmakers write letter urging schools to pay athletes directly
item.description: (KRON) -- A pair of California state senators wrote a letter on Wednesday urging schools in the Golden State to change how collegiate athletes are paid.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: SoFi Stadium awarded 2025, 2027 Concacaf Nations League finals
item.description: Los Angeles is set to host not one, but two more significant soccer matchups, including one next year. SoFi Stadium will be the site of the next two Concacaf Nations League Finals in 2025 and 2027, officials announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Utah HC beats Chicago in historic opener, 5-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was an historic day with a memorable ending. The Utah Hockey Club never trailed after getting first-period goals from Dylan Guenther and Clayton Keller and held off a late rally to beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-2 in the season opener for both teams on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chicago Fire FC names Gregg Berhalter, former U.S. Men's National Team coach, as director of football and head coach
item.description: CHICAGO — Chicago Fire FC has hired former U.S. Men's National Soccer Team head coach Gregg Berhalter as its head coach and director of football, the Major League Soccer team announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Raccoon sparks chaos in stands during Broncos game against Raiders
item.description: Football fans packed Empower Field in Denver on Sunday to watch the Broncos take on the Las Vegas Raiders, but they weren’t the only ones in attendance.
item.dc:creator: Maddie Rhodes, Fox 5

item.title: Another state regulator targets Brewers owner over alleged sand theft in Malibu
item.description: A second state agency is targeting the owner of the Milwaukee Brewers for taking sand from a Malibu beach.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5
